release_name: CyberShield Decision Assurance Forward Plan Implementation
status: static prototype with preferred rich route, stable fallback, canonical executive report, canonical record verification, feedback integration, and Sheet row verification workflow
root_behavior: Root directs visitors to the preferred vendor-risk Decision Assurance route.
north_star: Before relying on AI, CyberShield shows whether the recommendation is defensible.
core_workflow: AI-generated recommendation in -> AI Trust Decision Record out

forward_plan_status.2026061143-report-layout-polish-after-pr: implemented as /ai-trust-decision-record-report.html; manual print inspection still required
forward_plan_status.2026061144-feedback-integration-after-re: implemented as /feedback-triage.html and /feedback-integration-review.html; awaits real reviewer feedback
forward_plan_status.2026061146-canonical-record-unification: implemented through shared mapper, executive report, and /canonical-record-unification.html; preferred-route direct mapper migration remains a later refactor
forward_plan_status.2026061147-google-sheet-row-verification: verification workflow implemented; actual Sheet row verification remains operationally required

google_sheets_capture.verification_rule: Browser submission is not proof of row creation. Verify the Google Sheet row before claiming capture success.

release_guardrails: Use /vendor-risk-next.html as preferred high-touch demo route.
Use /vendor-risk.html as fallback if any browser slows or freezes.
TrustMap, Runtime agents, generic trust scores, broad dashboards, and multi-industry expansion remain deferred.
No Google Sheet success claim is allowed until a real row is verified.
Do not claim production readiness, compliance certification, or autonomous vendor approval.
manual_gates_remaining: Inspect actual browser Print / Save PDF output from /ai-trust-decision-record-report.html.
Load real reviewer feedback into /feedback-triage.html and run /feedback-integration-review.html.
Submit a real capture and complete /google-sheet-row-verification.html.
Consider a later preferred-route refactor to call the shared canonical mapper directly.
